changes: Restored v5 EOS UI shell/card styling; no v6 Drawer/AdapterTile regression.
Replaced only EOS branding logo SVGs with the old NexoWatt logo requested by the user.
Stopped runtime logo replacement outside explicit branding areas so instance/service rows keep their own icons or neutral placeholders.
Removed logout button from login view robustly and added CSS guard.
Added login href sanitizing to avoid login/logout redirect 404 loops.
Restored technical OAuth client_id in Login.tsx to upstream ioBroker for future builds.
Replaced admin.svg copies with the old NexoWatt logo for consistent Admin branding.
